title: EMI Calculator
metaDescription: Calculate your monthly loan EMI instantly. Free EMI calculator for home loan, car loan & personal loan with amortization schedule. Fast and accurate.
metaTitle: EMI Calculator – Free Online Loan EMI Calculator (2026)

faqs.a: EMI (Equated Monthly Installment) is a fixed monthly payment you make to repay a loan. It includes both principal and interest.
EMI = [P × R × (1+R)^N] / [(1+R)^N – 1], where P is principal, R is monthly rate, and N is number of months.

faqs.q: Is this EMI calculator free to use?
faqs.a: Yes, completely free. No login required.

faqs.q: Does a higher tenure reduce my EMI?
faqs.a: Yes, a longer tenure reduces EMI but increases total interest paid.

metaTitle: BMI Calculator – Free Online BMI Checker with Healthy Ranges (2026)

faqs.a: BMI is a measure of body fat based on height and weight that applies to adult men and women.
BMI = weight (kg) / height² (m). A BMI between 18.5 and 24.9 is considered healthy.

faqs.q: Is BMI an accurate measure of health?
faqs.a: BMI is a useful screening tool but not diagnostic. Athletes may have high BMI due to muscle mass.
Yes, completely free. No personal data is stored.

title: SIP Calculator
metaDescription: Calculate SIP returns on your mutual fund investments. Find out how much your monthly SIP can grow. Free SIP calculator with compound growth projection.
metaTitle: SIP Calculator – Free SIP Return Calculator for Mutual Funds (2026)

faqs.a: SIP (Systematic Investment Plan) is a method of investing a fixed amount in mutual funds every month.
SIP uses compound interest: M = P × [(1+r)^n – 1] / r × (1+r), where r is monthly rate and n is months.

faqs.q: What return rate should I assume?
faqs.a: Historically, Indian equity mutual funds have given 10–15% annual returns on average.
Yes, completely free to use.

title: Compound Interest Calculator
metaDescription: Calculate compound interest and see how your investment grows over time. Free compound interest tool with yearly, quarterly, and monthly compounding.
metaTitle: Compound Interest Calculator – Investment Growth Tool (Free 2026)

faqs.a: Interest calculated on both principal and accumulated interest from previous periods.

faqs.q: What is the compound interest formula?
faqs.a: A = P × (1 + r/n)^(n×t), where P is principal, r is annual rate, n is compounding frequency, t is years.

faqs.q: How is it different from simple interest?
faqs.a: Compound interest earns interest on interest, resulting in exponential growth vs linear for simple interest.
Yes, completely free.

title: Simple Interest Calculator
metaDescription: Calculate simple interest on loans or savings instantly. Free SI calculator — enter principal, rate, and time to get interest and total amount.
metaTitle: Simple Interest Calculator – Free Online Tool with Formula & Examples (2026)

faqs.a: SI = (P × R × T) / 100, where P is principal, R is rate per year, T is time in years.
Used in short-term loans, car loans, and some savings accounts.

faqs.q: Difference between simple and compound interest?
faqs.a: Simple interest is on principal only. Compound earns interest on interest too.
Yes, uses the standard SI formula.

metaTitle: Markup Calculator – Free Online Tool with Formula & Examples (2026)

faqs.a: Markup is the amount added to the cost price of goods to cover overhead and profit.
It multiplies the cost by the markup percentage and adds it to the cost to find the selling price.
Selling Price = Cost + (Cost × Markup%). Markup Amount = Cost × Markup%.
Yes, it uses standard business accounting formulas for accurate pricing.

title: Break Even Calculator
metaDescription: Calculate your break-even point instantly with our free online tool. Get accurate results with formula and step-by-step explanation. Fast and easy.
metaTitle: Break Even Calculator – Free Online Tool with Formula & Examples (2026)

faqs.a: The break-even point is the production level where total revenues equal total expenses.
It calculates how many units must be sold to cover all fixed and variable costs.
Break-Even Units = Fixed Costs / (Selling Price - Variable Cost per Unit).
Yes, it provides precise calculations for business planning and feasibility analysis.

title: Sales Tax Calculator
metaDescription: Calculate sales tax instantly with our free online tool. Get accurate results with formula and step-by-step explanation. Fast and easy.
metaTitle: Sales Tax Calculator – Free Online Tool with Formula & Examples (2026)

faqs.a: Sales tax is a consumption tax imposed by the government on the sale of goods and services.
It calculates the tax amount based on the percentage rate and adds it to the base price.
Sales Tax = Base Amount × (Tax Rate / 100). Total = Base Amount + Sales Tax.
Yes, it provides standard tax calculations used in retail and business.

title: Hourly to Salary Calculator
metaDescription: Convert hourly pay to annual salary instantly with our free online tool. Get accurate results with formula and step-by-step explanation. Fast and easy.
metaTitle: Hourly to Salary Calculator – Free Online Tool with Formula & Examples (2026)

faqs.q: What is an hourly to salary conversion?
faqs.a: It estimates your annual earnings based on a fixed hourly wage and standard work hours.
It multiplies your hourly rate by weekly hours and then by 52 weeks in a year.
Annual Salary = Hourly Rate × Hours per Week × 52.
Yes, assuming a consistent 52-week work year without unpaid time off.

title: Salary to Hourly Calculator
metaDescription: Convert annual salary to hourly pay instantly with our free online tool. Get accurate results with formula and step-by-step explanation. Fast and easy.
metaTitle: Salary to Hourly Calculator – Free Online Tool with Formula & Examples (2026)

faqs.q: What is salary to hourly conversion?
faqs.a: It breaks down your annual compensation into an equivalent hourly rate.
It divides your annual salary by 52 weeks and then by your hours worked per week.
Hourly Rate = Annual Salary / (52 × Hours per Week).
Yes, as per standard 2,080 hour work-year conventions (40 hours × 52 weeks).

title: Compound Growth Calculator
metaDescription: Calculate compound growth instantly with our free online tool. Get accurate results with formula and step-by-step explanation. Fast and easy.
metaTitle: Compound Growth Calculator – Free Online Tool with Formula & Examples (2026)

faqs.a: Compound growth is the process where the value of an asset increases exponentially over time.
It calculates the final value by applying the growth rate repeatedly to the previous period's total.
Final Value = Initial Value × (1 + Growth Rate / 100) ^ Years.
Yes, it uses the standard geometric growth formula for precision.

title: Savings Interest Calculator
metaDescription: Calculate interest on your savings instantly with our free online tool. Get accurate results with formula and step-by-step explanation. Fast and easy.
metaTitle: Savings Interest Calculator – Free Online Tool with Formula & Examples (2026)

faqs.a: Interest is the money a bank pays you for keeping your funds in a savings account.
It calculates the interest earned based on the principal amount, rate, and compounding frequency.
A = P(1 + r/n)^(nt). Where A is amount, P is principal, r is rate, n is compounding per year, t is years.
Yes, it follows standard financial interest calculation rules.

title: Unit Price Calculator
metaDescription: Calculate the price per unit instantly with our free online tool. Get accurate results with formula and step-by-step explanation. Fast and easy.
metaTitle: Unit Price Calculator – Free Online Tool with Formula & Examples (2026)

faqs.a: Unit price is the cost of a single item or a standard measure within a bulk package.
It divides the total cost by the number of units to find the individual cost.
Unit Price = Total Price / Quantity.
Yes, it provides a precise division result for cost comparison.

title: Cost Per Mile Calculator
metaDescription: Calculate travel cost per mile instantly with our free online tool. Get accurate results with formula and step-by-step explanation. Fast and easy.
metaTitle: Cost Per Mile Calculator – Free Online Tool with Formula & Examples (2026)

faqs.a: It is a efficiency metric showing the average fuel expense for every mile traveled.
It divides your total fuel expenditure by the total distance driven.
Cost Per Mile = Total Cost / Total Distance.
Yes, it yields the exact average based on the data points provided.

title: Time Zone Converter
metaDescription: Convert time zones instantly with our free online tool. Get accurate results with formula and step-by-step explanation. Fast and easy.
metaTitle: Time Zone Converter – Free Online Tool with Formula & Examples (2026)

faqs.a: It is the process of adjusting time based on the longitudinal offset from Greenwich Mean Time.
It calculates the difference between UTC offsets and adjusts the source time accordingly.
Target Time = Source Time + (Target UTC Offset - Source UTC Offset).
Yes, it uses standard offsets for primary global time zones.

title: Work Hours Calculator
metaDescription: Calculate total work hours instantly with our free online tool. Get accurate results with formula and step-by-step explanation. Fast and easy.
metaTitle: Work Hours Calculator – Free Online Tool with Formula & Examples (2026)

faqs.q: What is a work hours calculator?
faqs.a: It is a tool used to log and sum the duration of a shift while subtracting unpaid breaks.
It computes the time difference between start and end and subtracts the break time.
Total Hours = (End Time - Start Time) - Break Time.
Yes, it provides a precise calculation of net working time.

title: Overtime Calculator
metaDescription: Calculate overtime pay instantly with our free online tool. Get accurate results with formula and step-by-step explanation. Fast and easy.
metaTitle: Overtime Calculator – Free Online Tool with Formula & Examples (2026)

faqs.a: Overtime pay is the additional compensation paid for hours worked beyond the standard work week.
It multiplies your overtime hours by your rate and the overtime multiplier (often 1.5x).
Overtime Pay = Overtime Hours × Hourly Rate × Multiplier.
Yes, assuming the correct multiplier and hours are entered manually.

title: Grade Percentage Calculator
metaDescription: Calculate your grade percentage instantly with our free online tool. Get accurate results with formula and step-by-step explanation. Fast and easy.
metaTitle: Grade Percentage Calculator – Free Online Tool with Formula & Examples (2026)

faqs.a: It is the percentage score representing your performance relative to the maximum possible marks.
It divides your earned score by the total possible score and multiplies by 100.
Grade (%) = (Points Earned / Total Points) × 100.
Yes, it provides a standard percentage calculation for academic grading.

title: Weighted Average Calculator
metaDescription: Calculate weighted averages instantly with our free online tool. Get accurate results with formula and step-by-step explanation. Fast and easy.
metaTitle: Weighted Average Calculator – Free Online Tool with Formula & Examples (2026)

faqs.a: An average where some values contribute more to the result than others.
It multiplies each value by its weight, sums them up, and divides by the sum of all weights.
Weighted Average = Σ(Value × Weight) / ΣWeights.
Yes, it accurately computes the relative mean based on your input pairs.
